title: C & C Builders Pack

body:
![A modpack designed to take building to the next level, giving you more tools and creativity while keeping the classic vanilla feel of Minecraft.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53f9889a70cf2cdcba10dbf4ce26775c6e8d16c3.jpeg)
A modpack designed to take building to the next level, giving you more tools and creativity while keeping the classic vanilla feel of Minecraft

## Features
- ⚡ Performance boost and smoother gameplay with Sodium and other optimization mods
- 🛠 Powerful building tools like Axiom and WorldEdit for faster construction
- 🌿 Fully vanilla-friendly experience — no new blocks or items, just enhanced tools
- 🔧 Quality-of-life improvements to make building and editing easier
- 👥 Perfect for solo or multiplayer creative projects
- 🎨 Allows precise structure placement and editing while keeping Minecraft classic
- 💡 Ideal for builders who want efficiency without changing the game’s core




The C&C Builders Pack is a simple vanilla-friendly modpack made for builders who want powerful tools without changing the core game. It doesn’t add new blocks or items — instead, it focuses on building utilities like Axiom and WorldEdit to make construction faster, easier, and more fun. Perfect for anyone who enjoys creating in Minecraft while keeping the classic vanilla experience intact.
